default_card_0_desc: What happens if the pound drops?
default_card_0_query: Model what happens to my margin if GBP falls 10% against my import currency
default_card_1_query: Score my suppliers by on-time delivery rate and financial impact
default_card_2_desc: What does shipping actually cost me?
default_card_2_query: Calculate my true landed cost including freight, duty, VAT and FX buffer
default_card_3_query: Which export market should I expand into next based on my product?
pos_card_0_query: What are my POS sales today? Show revenue, transaction count, and top products.
pos_card_1_query: What are my top 10 selling products this week by revenue and quantity?
pos_card_2_query: Show me staff performance — sales per cashier, average transaction value, and transaction count.
pos_card_3_query: Which products are running low on stock? Show items below reorder point.
stripe_card_0_query: Show me my Stripe revenue this month — total charges, refunds, and net revenue.
stripe_card_1_query: Compare my Stripe revenue this month vs last month. What’s the growth rate?
stripe_card_2_query: How many failed payments did I have this month? What’s the total lost revenue?
stripe_card_3_query: What is my average order value this month and how does it compare to last month?
shopify_card_0_query: Show me my Shopify sales today — orders, revenue, and top products.
shopify_card_1_query: Which Shopify products are running low on inventory? Show items with less than 10 units.
shopify_card_2_query: What is my Shopify return and refund rate this month? Which products have the highest return rate?
shopify_card_3_query: What are my best selling Shopify products this week by revenue?
xero_card_0_query: Give me a profit and loss summary for this month from my Xero data.
xero_card_1_query: What does my cash flow look like? Show money in, money out, and net position.
xero_card_2_query: How many outstanding invoices do I have? What’s the total overdue amount?
xero_card_3_query: Break down my expenses by category this month. What are my biggest cost areas?
quickbooks_card_0_query: Give me a profit and loss summary for this month from my QuickBooks data.
quickbooks_card_1_query: What does my cash flow look like from QuickBooks? Show money in, money out, and net position.
quickbooks_card_2_query: How many outstanding invoices do I have in QuickBooks? Total overdue amount?
quickbooks_card_3_query: Break down my expenses by category this month from QuickBooks.
amazon_fba_card_0_query: Show me my Amazon FBA sales this month — orders, revenue, and top ASINs.
amazon_fba_card_1_query: Break down my Amazon FBA fees this month — fulfilment, storage, referral. What percentage of revenue goes to fees?
amazon_fba_card_2_query: What are my top 10 Amazon products by profit after FBA fees?
amazon_fba_card_3_query: Which Amazon products have the highest return rate? Show return rate and reason breakdown.
cfo_card_0_query: Give me a detailed profit and loss summary for this month. Include revenue, COGS, gross profit, operating expenses, and net profit with month-over-month comparison.
cfo_card_1_query: What is my current EBITDA and EBITDA margin? How does it compare to last month? Estimate my business valuation based on EBITDA multiples.
cfo_card_2_query: Show me my cash flow — money in, money out, net position, and how many months of runway I have at the current burn rate.
cfo_card_3_query: Show my month-over-month revenue growth, gross margin trend, and net margin trend for the last 6 months.
track_not_saved: This shipment is not yet saved to your account.
track_add_prompt: Want me to add it to your shipment tracker for ongoing monitoring?
track_no_data: 📦 Tracking number **{number}** — no tracking data available yet. The shipment may not have been scanned by the carrier. [{link}](https://www.17track.net/en/track?nums={number})
track_error: 📦 Could not retrieve tracking data for **{number}**. Please try again or [{link}](https://www.17track.net/en/track?nums={number})
file_loaded: I’ve loaded **{name}** — {rows} rows, {cols} columns ({headers}). What would you like to know?
scenario_tooltip: Run a “what if” scenario on your business
cfo_tooltip: Switch to accountant-style reports with metrics and tables
empty_greeting_named: What do you want to know, {name}?
empty_greeting: What do you want to know?
empty_subtitle: Just ask in plain English — no jargon, no spreadsheets needed.
connect_cta_title: Get answers with your actual numbers
connect_cta_desc: Connect Shopify, Amazon, QuickBooks or upload a CSV
limit_body: You’ve used all your free questions this month. Upgrade to keep going.
connection_error: Connection issue — please check your internet and try again.
status_connect_link: Connect your shop or upload a file
save_prompt_subtitle: Give it a short label so you can reuse it.
